description: Full supple-soft leather upper with cut out panels on the lateral forefoot for breathable comfortAnkle strap for enhanced support with a velcro closure to lock the foot in placeToe box foxing in leather for enhanced durabilityCork footbed for all-day long comfortDurable EVA outsole with textured panels to enhance grip and comfortFlex grooves in the forefoot and the heel area to further add to grip and traction
